betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Survey Scanner§f locates underground resource deposits.

§eFunction:§f
• Detects oil deposits
• Finds mineral veins
• Shows deposit boundaries

§eOperation:§f
• Right-click to scan area
• Results show depth and extent
• Plan extraction operations

§aTip:§f Scan before placing derricks/pumpjacks to find optimal locations.
